message:
feat(test): add proptest_indexing with 40 property-based tests for search indexing

Property-based coverage for ingest accounting, dedup, resize pause, cass dedup,
search correctness/limits, persistence round-trip, reindex, TTL expiry, LRU
eviction, rate limiting, scrollback chunking, command block extraction, agent
artifact extraction, ANSI stripping, text normalization, stats invariants,
config validation, and flush behavior.

Also fix clippy if_same_then_else warning in hybrid_search.rs FusionBackend::parse.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
